name: Beeper
description: Bridge OpenClaw sessions and agents into Beeper.

accessToken.label: Beeper Access Token
accessToken.help: Beeper Matrix access token returned by login.

hsToken.label: Homeserver Token
hsToken.help: Homeserver token returned by Beeper bridge registration.

asToken.label: Appservice Token
asToken.help: Appservice token returned by Beeper bridge registration.

bridgeManagerToken.label: Bridge Manager Token
bridgeManagerToken.help: Optional Beeper bridge-manager token used to register the self-hosted bridge.

accessToken.description: Beeper Matrix access token returned by login.

asToken.description: Appservice token returned by Beeper bridge registration.

appserviceId.description: Matrix appservice id used in registration namespaces.

dataDir.description: Directory for bridge config, registration, and runtime state.

registrationUrl.description: Public or LAN callback URL for the Matrix appservice.

gatewayUrl.description: OpenClaw gateway URL used by the bridge runtime.

homeserver.description: Beeper Matrix homeserver URL returned by login.

hsToken.description: Homeserver token returned by Beeper bridge registration.

matrixDeviceId.description: Beeper Matrix device id for this bridge.

matrixUserId.description: Beeper Matrix user id for this bridge.

allowedRoomIds.description: Optional allow-list of Matrix rooms the bridge may import from.

allowedUserIds.description: Optional allow-list of Matrix users the bridge may accept commands from.

importSources.description: OpenClaw session sources to import and backfill.

backfillLimit.description: Maximum OpenClaw messages to backfill per imported session.

nonFederatedRooms.description: Create Matrix rooms with non-federated room creation content where supported.

beeperEnv.description: Beeper environment for login and appservice registration.

bridgeManagerToken.description: Beeper bridge-manager token used to register the self-hosted bridge.

bridgeManagerPostState.description: Post Beeper bridge state after registering the self-hosted bridge.

baseDomain.description: Beeper API base domain for non-production environments.

homeserverDomain.description: Homeserver domain advertised in the Beeper appservice registration.

ghostLocalpartPrefix.description: Localpart prefix for deterministic OpenClaw ghost users.

senderLocalpart.description: Localpart for the Beeper bridge sender user.

serviceBotLocalpart.description: Localpart for the OpenClaw service bot user.

storePath.description: Path for Matrix client store state.

userLocalpartPrefix.description: Localpart prefix for imported OpenClaw user ghosts.

contactVisibility.description: Which OpenClaw identities should appear in Beeper contacts.

streamFinalization.description: How native Beeper stream output is finalized.

approvalBehavior.description: How Beeper approval decisions resolve OpenClaw approval gates.
